outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to negative GEX in weekly and monthly expiries, amplifying price movements.
outlook.summary: Market shows bearish smirk skew with heavy put hedging. Dealers are short gamma in weekly/monthly tenors, creating unstable conditions. Key resistance at 660, strong support at 630.

levels.motivazione: Weekly Max Pain and dominant Call Open Interest (33k) creates strong resistance. Dealers sell calls here.
Dominant Put OI across all expiries (24k 0DTE, 25k Weekly, 92k Monthly). Structural support.
0DTE Max Pain level acting as price attractor for intraday expiry.
levels.sintesiOperativa: PIN RISK: Price attracted to strike

levels.motivazione: Major Put OI cluster in Weekly (125k) and Monthly (102k). Secondary support.
Intraday resistance defined by highest 0DTE Call OI (17k).
